headline: Super Micro Gold Series Targets Faster AI Infrastructure And Enterprise Adoption

The systems target AI, compute, storage, and edge workloads, with an emphasis on rapid delivery. The Gold Series expands the company’s product portfolio at a time when it is also dealing with ongoing legal challenges. Super Micro Computer focuses on high performance server and storage solutions for data centers, AI deployments, and edge computing. The Gold Series...
